verdict: A decent Easy chart with creative hold patterns, but marred by awkward crossovers, forced double-steps, and overly complex syncopations for beginners.

issues.problem: This note is placed on an off-beat (3.5 beats into the intro), which creates an unintuitive rhythm for an Easy chart.
The pattern D -> U -> L -> D forces either a spin/crossover or awkward double-stepping at 160 BPM, which is too complex for an Easy player.
A syncopated off-beat note (dotted quarter rhythm) right before the drop disrupts the player's momentum and feel of the beat.
A sudden eighth-note pickup (gallop) at 160 BPM is highly unexpected and difficult for players at this difficulty level.
The sequence D -> L -> R -> U -> D has poor flow, requiring unnatural foot transitions and crossovers.
